https://store.momschoiceawards.com/produ.title: Wireless Bluetooth Stereo Headphones for Kids
https://store.momschoiceawards.com/produ.description:
Providing true freedom from cumbersome wires that kids can easily get tangled in, the NEW Kidz Gear™ Wireless Bluetooth Stereo Headphones are perfect for everything from music, gaming, dance, and exercise apps that require movement, to watching movies and interacting with audio educational and entertainment apps. Essential audio gear for children everywhere, the Kidz Gear Bluetooth Stereo Headphones are compatible with all devices that support Bluetooth 4.0, including iPhones, iPads, Kindles, Nooks, Android smartphones and tablets, and computers (with a Bluetooth adapter). The headphones will also quickly charge through USB with the included FREE cable. Available in blue and pink, the headphones also include a patented removable omnidirectional Boom Microphone, ideal for children’s foreign language studies, audio/verbal test-taking at school and at home gaming and online chatting. Designed with versatility in mind, these wireless headphones can even be transformed into wired headphones with the simple addition of the included audio interconnection cable.

With the easy to use KidzSync™ audio-synching provided through a multi-button interface, the Bluetooth Stereo Headphones can be quickly setup and paired with a variety of audio/video devices. The headphones include high-quality audio components necessary to deliver an outstanding hi-fi audio experience and support the Bluetooth Profiles: A2DP, AVRCP, HF and HS.

Incorporated in 2001, San Ramon, California Supply and Beyond, LLC is the exclusive manufacturer of the Kidz Gear brand of products and accessories. The Kidz Gear brand was created by founder and mother Laurie Peterson with the purpose of developing a line of products and accessories with adult features, performance and quality but with ergonomic sizes, styles and prices for children.
